modals.termsBody:
EXEREYES DIGITAL HEALTH APPLICATION USER AGREEMENT

1. PARTIES

1.1. This User Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between Lotus Sport Technology and Education Services Industry Marketing and Trade Limited Company (hereinafter referred to as "Company" or "Data Controller") and the natural person user ("User") who downloads and/or uses the Exereyes mobile application ("Application") from Google Play.

1.2. Company's contact information:

Title: Lotus Sport Technology and Education Services Industry Marketing and Trade Limited Company

Address: Entertech İstanbul Teknokent

Email: info@lotussport.net

Phone: +31628864484

2. SUBJECT AND SCOPE OF THE AGREEMENT

2.1. This Agreement covers the conditions for the User's use of the Exereyes Application, the rights and obligations of the parties, the principles regarding the processing, storage, sharing and security of personal data, health risk and liability disclaimer provisions, data sharing and interactions with third parties, age restrictions and competent court regulations.

2.2. The Application is developed for individuals aged 15 and over, and is not suitable for children (under 15 years of age). The use of the Application by children is prohibited.

3. DEFINITIONS

3.1. Application: The digital health application published on Google Play under the name Exereyes and developed by Lotus Sport Technology and Education Services Industry Marketing and Trade Limited Company.

3.2. User: A natural person aged 15 and over who accepts this Agreement by downloading or using the Application from Google Play.

3.3. Personal Data: Refers to any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person (name-surname, age, height, weight, email, phone number, injury history, profile photo, etc.).

3.4. Special Category Personal Data: Sensitive data categories such as health information, biometric data, injury history.

3.5. Data Controller: The natural or legal person who determines the purposes and means of processing personal data and is responsible for the establishment and management of the data recording system (the Company within the scope of this Agreement).

3.6. Data Processor: The natural or legal person who processes personal data on behalf of the Data Controller based on the authority given by the Data Controller (e.g., cloud service providers, third parties providing artificial intelligence services).

3.7. Solution Partner: Third-party companies providing cloud and artificial intelligence services such as Google, Render, Neon.

4. TERMS OF USE AND AGE RESTRICTION

4.1. The Application can only be used by individuals aged 15 and over. The use of the Application by children under 15 years of age is prohibited. The Company takes necessary measures for age verification; the User is responsible for the accuracy of the age information they declare.

4.2. The User declares that by downloading and/or using the Application, they have read, understood and accepted all provisions of this Agreement.

5. PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA, CATEGORIES AND PURPOSES

5.1. The following personal data is collected and processed from the User within the scope of the Application:

Identity Information: Name, surname

Demographic Information: Age, height, weight

Contact Information: Email address, phone number

Health Information: Injury history, exercise goals

Visual Data: Profile photo, exercise images taken with camera

Application Usage Information: Exercise preferences, profile updates, in-app movements

5.2. Personal data is processed for the following purposes:

Creating and updating user profile

Personalizing and filtering exercise recommendations

Communicating with the user and providing information

Ensuring and improving the functionality of the Application

Fulfilling user requests (profile update, freezing, deletion)

Fulfilling legal obligations

Security and fraud prevention measures

Statistical analysis and reporting

Converting images taken with camera into exercise equipment and including them in the dataset (including labeling)

5.3. Personal data is processed in accordance with the processing conditions specified in Articles 5 and 6 of the Law. Special category personal data such as health and injury history are processed with the explicit consent of the User.

6. LEGAL BASIS FOR PROCESSING PERSONAL DATA

6.1. Personal data is processed for the following legal reasons within the scope of Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ("KVKK") and relevant legislation:

Explicit consent of the User

Being necessary for the establishment and performance of the contract

Fulfillment of the Data Controller's legal obligations

Being made public by the User themselves

Data processing being necessary for the legitimate interests of the Data Controller (provided that it does not harm the fundamental rights and freedoms of the User)

6.2. Special category personal data (health, injury history, visual data) is processed only with the explicit consent of the User. Explicit consent is obtained through the approval given by the User when registering to the Application or performing the relevant transaction.

7. STORAGE AND DESTRUCTION PERIODS OF PERSONAL DATA

7.1. Personal data is stored for the period required by the processing purposes and for the maximum periods specified in the relevant legislation. After the use of the Application ends, the data continues to be stored for at least 3 (three) months; after this period, it is deleted, destroyed or anonymized.

7.2. Upon the expiration of the storage period, deletion of the User's account or withdrawal of explicit consent, personal data is deleted, destroyed or anonymized in accordance with the periodic destruction policy. Destruction processes are recorded and audited.

7.3. Storage and destruction processes are carried out in accordance with the Company's Personal Data Storage and Destruction Policy.

8. TRANSFER OF PERSONAL DATA AND TRANSFER ABROAD

8.1. Personal data may be transferred to the following third parties and solution partners for the functionality of the Application and the provision of services:

Cloud service providers (Google, Render, Neon, etc.)

Third parties providing artificial intelligence and image processing services (Google AI, etc.)

Authorized public institutions and organizations within the scope of legal obligations

8.2. The transfer of personal data abroad is carried out in accordance with Article 9 of KVKK and relevant legislation provisions, by obtaining the explicit consent of the User or to countries where adequate protection is determined by the Board, with appropriate guarantee methods. For transfers to countries where adequate protection is not available, standard contracts, binding corporate rules or Board-approved undertakings are used.

8.3. The User accepts that by using the Application, they explicitly consent to the transfer of their personal data abroad.

9. TECHNICAL AND ADMINISTRATIVE MEASURES REGARDING THE SECURITY OF PERSONAL DATA

9.1. The Company takes the following technical and administrative measures to prevent unlawful processing and access of personal data and to ensure data security:

Encryption and communication security (HTTPS/TLS)

Access control and authorization

Strong password policy and multi-factor authentication

Regular software updates and closing security vulnerabilities

Data encryption in server and cloud environments

Logging and monitoring systems

Backup and data loss prevention

KVKK and information security training for employees

Confidentiality undertakings and disciplinary procedures

Written contracts (DPA) with data processors and audit rights

Notification and crisis management plan in case of data breach

9.2. All environments where personal data is processed (cloud, physical, electronic) are protected with security measures. Measures are taken against unauthorized access, data loss, cyber attacks and similar threats.

10. USER RIGHTS

10.1. The User has the following rights within the scope of Article 11 of KVKK:

Learning whether personal data is processed

Requesting information if personal data has been processed

Learning the purpose of processing personal data and whether they are used in accordance with their purpose

Knowing the third parties to whom personal data is transferred domestically or abroad

Requesting correction of personal data if it is incomplete or incorrectly processed

Requesting deletion or destruction of personal data

Requesting notification of the operations to third parties to whom personal data has been transferred

Objecting to the emergence of a result against the person by analyzing the processed data exclusively through automated systems

Requesting compensation for damage in case of loss due to unlawful processing of personal data

10.2. The User can communicate these rights to the Company in writing or through methods determined by the Personal Data Protection Board. The Company finalizes applications within 30 (thirty) days at the latest.

10.3. The User has the right to update, freeze and delete their profile through the Application or the Company's communication channels. Upon account deletion request, personal data is destroyed after the legal storage period.

11. USER OBLIGATIONS

11.1. The User is obliged to provide accurate, current and complete information when registering and using the Application. The User is responsible for any liability arising from providing false or incomplete information.

11.2. The User accepts and undertakes that they will use the Application only for personal purposes and in accordance with the legislation, will not violate the rights of third parties, and will not engage in activities that would endanger the security of the Application.

11.3. The User is responsible for the security of their account. They must keep their password confidential and not share it with unauthorized persons.

12. SHARING WITH THIRD PARTIES AND LIABILITIES

12.1. Camera images obtained from the User may be shared with Google artificial intelligence and similar third-party applications to be converted into exercise equipment and labeled. These images, if included in the dataset, are labeled and may be used in anonymized form.

12.2. Data sharing with third parties is carried out only for the functionality of the Application and to provide services to the User, and in accordance with KVKK. The data security and privacy obligations of third parties are secured through contracts made with the Company.

12.3. The Company is not directly responsible for data security breaches by third parties; however, it is obliged to exercise due diligence in the selection and supervision of data processors.

13. HEALTH RISK AND LIABILITY DISCLAIMER

13.1. The Application provides exercise recommendations to the User; however, these recommendations do not constitute medical diagnosis, treatment or professional health services. The Application should not be used for the diagnosis, treatment or prevention of any disease.

13.2. The User should not apply the exercises in the Application without consulting a doctor regarding their health status and exercise suitability. There is no "consult a doctor" warning or injury information in the Application.

13.3. The Company is not responsible for any direct or indirect damages that may arise from the User's health status, exercise practices or use of the Application. The User uses the Application at their own responsibility.

13.4. In case of an emergency health condition or injury risk, the User should immediately consult a health professional.

14. PRIVACY POLICY AND INFORMATION

14.1. The Company takes all necessary technical and administrative measures to protect the privacy of the User's personal data. The privacy policy is published on the Application and the Company's website and made available to the User.

14.2. The User declares that by downloading and/or using the Application, they have read and accepted the privacy policy.

14.3. The privacy policy and information text explains the purposes of processing personal data, sharing situations, storage and destruction periods, User rights and application methods.

15. USER CONSENT AND REGISTRATION PROCESS

15.1. The User confirms that they have read, understood and accepted this Agreement and the privacy policy when registering to the Application.

15.2. Explicit consent is obtained from the User for the processing and transfer abroad of personal data. Explicit consent must be based on information, related to a specific subject and given with free will. The User can withdraw their explicit consent at any time.

15.3. The User can manage their consents, withdraw their consent or delete their profile through in-app settings or the Company's communication channels.

16. NOTIFICATION AND CRISIS MANAGEMENT IN CASE OF DATA BREACH

16.1. In case of personal data being obtained, disclosed or lost by unauthorized persons, the Company notifies the relevant person and the Personal Data Protection Board as soon as possible.

16.2. In case of data breach, the Company immediately conducts a preliminary assessment, carries out blocking and recovery work, identifies risks and takes necessary technical/administrative measures.

16.3. Users affected by the breach are informed through the Company's website or communication channels.

17. DURATION, TERMINATION AND CHANGES OF THE AGREEMENT

17.1. This Agreement enters into force on the date the User first starts using the Application and remains valid as long as the User continues to use the Application.

17.2. The parties can terminate the Agreement at any time. The User can terminate the Agreement by deleting their account. The Company may suspend or terminate the User's account if the User acts in violation of the Agreement or legislation.

17.3. The Company reserves the right to make changes to the Agreement. Changes are announced through the Application or the Company's website and submitted for the User's approval. If the User does not accept the changes, they can delete their account.

18. COMPENSATION AND LIABILITY LIMITATIONS

18.1. The User is personally responsible for any damage arising from their actions in violation of this Agreement, legislation or the rights of third parties while using the Application.

18.2. The Company does not guarantee that the Application will work uninterruptedly, without errors or in full compliance with expectations. The Company is not responsible for the Application being unusable due to technical malfunctions, maintenance work, force majeure or problems arising from third parties.

18.3. The Company's total liability is limited to the total amount paid by the User during the period they used the Application. The Company cannot be held liable for indirect, incidental, special or punitive damages.

19. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS

19.1. All intellectual and industrial property rights related to the Application, its content, software, design, trademarks and logos belong to the Company. The User can only use the Application for personal purposes; they cannot reproduce, distribute, modify, reverse engineer, or allow third parties to use it.

19.2. The User declares that the content they share in the Application (images, profile photo, etc.) belongs to them and does not violate the rights of third parties.

20. APPLICABLE LAW AND COMPETENT COURT

20.1. This Agreement is subject to the laws of the Republic of Turkey.

20.2. Istanbul (European Side) Courts and Enforcement Offices have exclusive jurisdiction over all disputes arising from this Agreement.

21. NOTIFICATIONS AND COMMUNICATION

21.1. All notifications to be made between the parties are made to the Company's contact addresses specified above or to the email address declared by the User in the Application.

21.2. The User is obliged to immediately inform the Company of any changes in their contact information.

22. EFFECTIVENESS AND ACCEPTANCE

22.1. This Agreement enters into force when approved by the User in electronic environment or when the Application starts to be used.

22.2. The User is deemed to have accepted all provisions of this Agreement by continuing to use the Application.

23. APPENDICES AND INFORMATION TEXTS

23.1. As an integral part of this Agreement, the KVKK Information Text and Explicit Consent Text are published in the Application and on the Company's website.

23.2. The User declares that they have read, understood and accepted the information text and explicit consent text.

24. EFFECTIVE DATE

24.1. This Agreement entered into force on December 1, 2025.

register.subtitle: Join ExerEyes and unlock personalized workouts.

passwordRules.title: Your new password must meet the following criteria:
passwordRules.minMaxLength: Must be at least 6 characters long.
passwordRules.lowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter.
passwordRules.uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter.
passwordRules.number: Must contain at least one number.
passwordRules.symbol: Must contain at least one symbol. (e.g., ! @ # $ % ^ & * etc.)
passwordRules.notCommon: Must not be too simple or commonly used passwords.
passwordRules.noPersonalInfo: Must not contain personal information such as name, surname, username, email.
